---
title: "Interactive Business Analytics Using R and Shiny"
format: html
---

\# Interactive Business Analytics Using R and Shiny

\## Project Outputs

\### Presentation

\[View Presentation\](presentation.html)

\### Handout

\[View Handout\](handout.html)

\### GitHub Repository
